name: cap-evolve
description: Optimize AI-agent capabilities (skills, tools/MCP, prompts, system prompts) against your eval, honestly. Skills-native and host-agnostic, with honest train/val/test discipline (sealed test, val-only gate) enforced by core-owned hooks. Exposes every phase/algorithm/capability/optimizer/orchestrate skill as a /cap-evolve:<skill> command, ships read-only diagnoser + writing proposer subagents, and a session-start router (using-cap-evolve) that auto-triggers the pipeline.
